name: minerva-care--caring
description: Apply a caring quality review to any work product — draft, plan, code, report, analysis, or reply — before it ships. Use when the user asks to review, check, or improve something; when finalising a deliverable; or when you want to ensure work meets a genuine standard of excellence rather than mere adequacy. The caring review asks whether the work was done with genuine attention or just completed. Trigger phrases: "caring check", "review this", "is this good enough", "check my work", "quality review", "does this land", "half-assed check".
